title: corymborkis intermedia
intro: Corymborkis intermedia, also known as the "dancing ladies orchid," is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical forests in Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Corymborkis intermedia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the roots in water or oil to create a medicinal tea or tincture.
